completeness_ph04.note: the diff IS the test + its fixtures; no untested new source

architecture.note: no production code; stub-as-adapter follows gh-stubs precedent; no domain->infra import

security.note: subprocess uses list args (no shell=True); stub echoes canned JSON, no injection/secrets/network

quality.note: full coverage of new behaviour; no dead surface; flow steps aligned across test/stub/card; no CR-10 anti-patterns
